name: Task Tree

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Task Tree 1.0.0 — first public release

See your Markdown tasks as a **tree** and a **Kanban board** at once. Plain Markdown, agent-ready.

## Highlights
- **Three tree layouts** (list, diagram with connectors, Miller columns) + full-focus mode, plus a Kanban board with drag-to-change-state
- **Roll-up**: a parent's progress derives from its children — it can never lie about being done
- **Capture flow**: add a task, type, press Enter — the next one is already waiting
- **Task = note**: open any task as its own note with self-describing frontmatter that reconciles automatically when tasks move — no matter who moved them
- **Dependencies**: `[tt-blocked-by:: id]` connects tasks across the tree, with badges, a blockers panel, and dashed edges in the diagram
- **Custom columns** per board (colors, WIP limits) via `tt_columns` frontmatter
- **AI-ready by design**: one-time consent adds an `AGENTS.md` + a Claude Code skill to your vault so AI assistants can safely operate your boards

## Install
Via [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) (`Aldorithm392/obsidian-task-tree`) or copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/task-tree/`.
